summary: Completed comprehensive testing of XRPL Universal Money Machine - backend APIs 95% successful, frontend core functionality working with some UI issues

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 400 'subscription already active' when user already has subscription

working_endpoints: /api/me - returns user info with subscription and slots

critical_bugs.issue: Modal overlay blocks navigation after closing - prevents clicking other nav items

ui_bugs.issue: Address badge not displaying XRPL address
Nested button elements causing React hydration errors

integration_issues.issue: Inconsistent navigation element visibility - Settings/Dashboard nav not always found

working_features: Landing page loads with proper branding and tier cards
Dashboard displays subscription status and navigation
Pair creation form works with demo address
Price alerts modal opens and accepts input
Logout functionality works (returns to landing page)

passed_tests: Backend health endpoint with XRP/USD price
All 3 subscription plans with correct structure
User info retrieval with subscription details
Landing page rendering with all components
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical modal overlay issue blocking navigation, resolve chart rendering problems (width/height = -1), and ensure address badge displays correctly. Also fix nested button HTML structure causing hydration errors.
success_percentage: Backend: 95% (19/20 tests passed), Frontend: 75% (core functionality works but has UI issues)
